name: workflow-board
title: WorkflowBoard
description: Workflow working surface: DataStatusBar freshness header + title row with a board toolbar + Switch-toggled RunHistory log + Card-wrapped Swimlane board. Selecting a run time-travels the diagram to that run's state (applyRun is inlined — the page is self-contained). Data arrives via props typed entirely from @trembus/ui; no new library API.

files.destinationHint: a pages/views dir (src/pages/ or src/routes/); single self-contained file — no companion css or hook

slots.name: toolbar-actions
slots.purpose: Board commands next to the Run history switch. Default renders a labelled Toolbar with a Refresh button when onRefresh is provided.

slots.name: inspector
slots.purpose: Details card for the selected run (status, note, output links by default).

setup: import '@trembus/ui/styles.css' once at the app entry
render inside a .tcl-root / themed shell (the AppShell template pairs well)
author the workflow SwimlaneContract with NO per-step status — runs supply it

changes: Initial template: DataStatusBar header, toolbar + Switch-toggled RunHistory, time-travelling Swimlane (inlined applyRun), selected-run inspector slot.
